rules.rationale: Seed rule, not evidence-based. Extreme volatility means a single candle spans more than the grid step, so a filled level is unlikely to find its +1 target before the next level fills. The evaluator will confirm, retune, or drop this once real trades exist.

Seed rule, not evidence-based. Grid trading earns in sideways and downtrending markets and underperforms buy-and-hold in a bull run; laddering into a blow-off top deploys capital at the worst levels. The evaluator will confirm, retune, or drop this once real trades exist.
